testcase.name: loginTest

failure.message: Login failed or URL mismatch! expected [https://www.saucedemo.com/inventory.html] but found [https://www.saucedemo.com/]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Login failed or URL mismatch! expected [https://www.saucedemo.com/inventory.html] but found [https://www.saucedemo.com/] at tests.LoginTest.loginTest(LoginTest.java:24) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) ... Removed 30 stack frames
